title: Institutional Capture
subtitle: Which institutions are captured by which vendors in Mexican federal procurement
errorMessage: Failed to load money flow data
errorHint: Please check that the backend is running and try again.
emptyMessage: No institution-vendor flow data available for the selected filters
emptyHint: Try adjusting the sector or year range filter.

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.content: Calculated from 3.1M procurement contracts (2002-2025) with amounts above 100K MXN. High concentration (>30% of an institution's budget going to a single vendor) is a risk indicator per OECD guidelines. Cell color intensity reflects the vendor's share of the institution's total procurement spend.

stats.highCaptureDesc: Flows where vendor holds >30% of institution spend
